name: Paradise
short_description: Paradise is a Boys Love visual novel and tells the story of a group of men who go on holiday on a deserted island. When things begin to go wrong, they realize to their horror that they are stranded. Turns out that’s only the start of their problems.
detailed_description:
Welcome to Paradise


Azuma thinks luck is finally on his side when he wins a holiday to a deserted island. He meets the other vacationers and settles in for a relaxing time. But when the boat with their food supplies doesn’t show up, and the radio stops working, things begin to go downhill fast. Can Azuma survive the deadly perils of this paradise?

Unique Friends


This group is filled with eligible bachelors for you! Meet Matsuda, Mitsugi, Takara, Shimada, and Hongou. They all have distinct traits and personalities, which will bring intricate situations along the way. How will you manage your relationship with them? Who do you wish to become closer and connected with?

Decide Your Romance


Paradise is a top-tier visual novel, with fantastic graphics and a branching narrative system. Will you achieve your desired romance, or are you doomed to a dark and grim fate?



Spark of Feelings

Experience the emotions that a paradise island has to offer. Feel your heartbeat as you get closer to your friends, or have the sensation of shivers down your spine with the secrets and dangers this island offers!
